entry.title: India China Tension: America ने दी राहत, अब 800 KM H स्पीड वाले Drone खरीदेगा भारत वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: India China Tension: America ने दी राहत, अब 800 KM H स्पीड वाले Drone खरीदेगा भारत वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
India China Tension: America gives relief, now India will buy a drone with speed up to 800 KM/H. The United States has taken a big decision amidst the ongoing conflict between India and China. In order to increase the defense capability of its allied countries, the US has considered category-2 instead of category-1 of unmanned air weeks at less than 800 kilometers.
भारत चीन के बीच जारी तनातनी के बीच अमेरिका ने एक बड़ा फैसला लिया है. अमेरिका ने अपने सहयोगी देशों की रक्षा क्षमता को बढ़ाने के लिए 800 किलोमीटर से कम रफ्तार वाले अनमैन्ड एयर वीकल्स की कैटगरी-1 की जगह कैटगरी-2 माना है.
#America #IndiaChinaTension #Drone
entry.summary: India China Tension: America gives relief, now India will buy a drone with speed up to 800 KM/H. The United States has taken a big decision amidst the ongoing conflict between India and China. In order to increase the defense capability of its allied countries, the US has considered category-2 instead of category-1 of unmanned air weeks at less than 800 kilometers. भारत चीन के बीच जारी तनातनी के बीच अमेरिका ने एक बड़ा फैसला लिया है. अमेरिका ने अपने सहयोगी देशों की रक्षा क्षमता को बढ़ाने के लिए 800 किलोमीटर से कम रफ्तार वाले अनमैन्ड एयर वीकल्स की कैटगरी-1 की जगह कैटगरी-2 माना है. #America #IndiaChinaTension #Drone

entry.title: IT ,BPO ஊழியர்களுக்கு டிசம்பர் வரை Work from home-க்கு அனுமதி - மத்திய அரசு

link.title: IT ,BPO ஊழியர்களுக்கு டிசம்பர் வரை Work from home-க்கு அனுமதி - மத்திய அரசு

entry.content:
ஐடி மற்றும் பிபிஓ நிறுவனங்களுக்கு ஜூலை 31ஆம் தேதி வரை மத்திய அரசு அனுமதி அளித்து இருந்தது. இந்த நிலையில் டிசம்பர் வரை வீட்டில் இருந்து வேலை செய்வதற்கான கால அவகாசத்தை நீடித்து மத்திய தகவல் தொடர்புத்துறை அறிவிப்பு வெளியிட்டுள்ளது.
entral Goverment has extended work from home relaxation to IT, BPO companies till Dec 31
entry.summary: ஐடி மற்றும் பிபிஓ நிறுவனங்களுக்கு ஜூலை 31ஆம் தேதி வரை மத்திய அரசு அனுமதி அளித்து இருந்தது. இந்த நிலையில் டிசம்பர் வரை வீட்டில் இருந்து வேலை செய்வதற்கான கால அவகாசத்தை நீடித்து மத்திய தகவல் தொடர்புத்துறை அறிவிப்பு வெளியிட்டுள்ளது. entral Goverment has extended work from home relaxation to IT, BPO companies till Dec 31

entry.title: LBCOIN: Lithuania issues world’s first state-backed digital collectible coin

link.title: LBCOIN: Lithuania issues world’s first state-backed digital collectible coin

entry.content: Lithuania becomes the first country to launch a digital currency backed by its central bank.View on euronews
entry.summary: Lithuania becomes the first country to launch a digital currency backed by its central bank.View on euronews

entry.title: Jalan Episode 6 - Presented by Ariel - 22nd July 2020

link.title: Jalan Episode 6 - Presented by Ariel - 22nd July 2020

entry.content:
Jalan Is About How Greed Can Take You To Any Extent
Jalan depicts the extent to which a person can go in jealousy and greed.
Misha and Nisha are two sisters; Nisha’s ambition leads her to destroy the life of her own sister.
Minal Khan as Nisha is the youngest daughter of her family. She is extremely spoiled and used to getting whatever she wants.
Areeba Habib as Misha is the elder sister of Nisha. She is loving and mature. She always gives in to Nisha, and let her take away all her prized possessions.
Both the sisters have polar opposite personalities. Misha always compromises while Nisha does not believe in compromising under any circumstances.
Sajida Syed as Sajeela and Mohammed Ahmed as Tanveer are the parents of Misha and Nisha.
Tanveer and Sajeela live happily with their two daughters whom they love a lot.
Emmad Irfani as Asfandyar belongs to a well-off family. He is charming and a complete gentleman. He falls in love with Misha at first sight and both of them get married.
Related: Here’s why people are lauding Mohib Mirza for Dushman-e-Jaan
Fahad Sheikh as Ahmer is the maternal cousin of Nisha and Misha. He is head over heels in love with Nisha.
Nisha might have Ahmer’s love but she is jealous of her sister’s lifestyle after marriage and starts to idealize Asfandyar which slowly becomes an obsession.
Directed By: Aabis Raza
Written By: Sidra Sehar Imran
Cast:
Minal Khan ,
Areeba Habib ,
Emmad Irfani .
Fahad Sheikh
Mohammed Ahmed
Sajida Syed
Nadia Hussain
Maira Khan
Sabiha Hashmi
Hajra Yamin
Every Wednesday at 8:00 PM, only on ARY Digital.
entry.summary: Jalan Is About How Greed Can Take You To Any Extent Jalan depicts the extent to which a person can go in jealousy and greed. Misha and Nisha are two sisters; Nisha’s ambition leads her to destroy the life of her own sister. Minal Khan as Nisha is the youngest daughter of her family. She is extremely spoiled and used to getting whatever she wants. Areeba Habib as Misha is the elder sister of Nisha. She is loving and mature. She always gives in to Nisha, and let her take away all her prized possessions. Both the sisters have polar opposite personalities. Misha always compromises while Nisha does not believe in compromising under any circumstances. Sajida Syed as Sajeela and Mohammed Ahmed as Tanveer are the parents of Misha and Nisha. Tanveer and Sajeela live happily with their two daughters whom they love a lot. Emmad Irfani as Asfandyar belongs to a well-off family. He is charming and a complete gentleman. He falls in love with Misha at first sight and both of them get married. Related: Here’s why people are lauding Mohib Mirza for Dushman-e-Jaan Fahad Sheikh as Ahmer is the maternal cousin of Nisha and Misha. He is head over heels in love with Nisha. Nisha might have Ahmer’s love but she is jealous of her sister’s lifestyle after marriage and starts to idealize Asfandyar which slowly becomes an obsession. Directed By: Aabis Raza Written By: Sidra Sehar Imran Cast: Minal Khan , Areeba Habib , Emmad Irfani . Fahad Sheikh Mohammed Ahmed Sajida Syed Nadia Hussain Maira Khan Sabiha Hashmi Hajra Yamin Every Wednesday at 8:00 PM, only on ARY Digital.

entry.title: Andhra Pradesh : బియ్యం కార్డులే ఆదాయ ధ్రువీక‌ర‌ణ ప‌త్రాలు.. రెవెన్యూ శాఖ‌ ఉత్త‌ర్వులు!

link.title: Andhra Pradesh : బియ్యం కార్డులే ఆదాయ ధ్రువీక‌ర‌ణ ప‌త్రాలు.. రెవెన్యూ శాఖ‌ ఉత్త‌ర్వులు!

entry.content:
andhra pradesh government has decided to consider rice card as income certicate for welfare scheme beneficiaries. govt has recently approved the decision.
#DharmanaKrishnaDas
#YSJagan
#AP
#RiceCard
#Rationcard
#IncomeCertificate
#AndhraPradesh
ఏపీలో పాలనా సంస్కరణ లను వేగవంతం చేస్తున్న జగన్ సర్కార్ ఈ దిశగా మరో కీలక నిర్ణయం తీసుకుంది. పేదలకు అత్యంత అవసరమైన ఆదాయ ధృవపత్రాల జారీకి సంబంధించి ముఖ్యమైన నిర్ణయాన్ని ప్రభుత్వం ఆమోదించింది. బియ్యం కార్డుల‌ను ఆదాయ ధ్రువీక‌ర‌ణ ప‌త్రాలుగా ప‌రిగ‌ణిస్తూ రెవెన్యూ శాఖ‌ ఉత్త‌ర్వులు జారీ చేసింది.
entry.summary: andhra pradesh government has decided to consider rice card as income certicate for welfare scheme beneficiaries. govt has recently approved the decision. #DharmanaKrishnaDas #YSJagan #AP #RiceCard #Rationcard #IncomeCertificate #AndhraPradesh ఏపీలో పాలనా సంస్కరణ లను వేగవంతం చేస్తున్న జగన్ సర్కార్ ఈ దిశగా మరో కీలక నిర్ణయం తీసుకుంది. పేదలకు అత్యంత అవసరమైన ఆదాయ ధృవపత్రాల జారీకి సంబంధించి ముఖ్యమైన నిర్ణయాన్ని ప్రభుత్వం ఆమోదించింది. బియ్యం కార్డుల‌ను ఆదాయ ధ్రువీక‌ర‌ణ ప‌త్రాలుగా ప‌రిగ‌ణిస్తూ రెవెన్యూ శాఖ‌ ఉత్త‌ర్వులు జారీ చేసింది.

entry.title: Un film Dirty Dancing 2 avec Jennifer Grey en préparation ?

link.title: Un film Dirty Dancing 2 avec Jennifer Grey en préparation ?

entry.content: Plus de 34 ans après, nous pourrions bientôt retrouver Frédérique "Bébé" Houseman. L’actrice Jennifer Grey serait en train de développer un projet de film sur l’univers de la danse, qui se déroulerait dans les années 90. Et s’il s’agissait de la suite officielle de Dirty Dancing ? On dit oui !
entry.summary: Plus de 34 ans après, nous pourrions bientôt retrouver Frédérique "Bébé" Houseman. L’actrice Jennifer Grey serait en train de développer un projet de film sur l’univers de la danse, qui se déroulerait dans les années 90. Et s’il s’agissait de la suite officielle de Dirty Dancing ? On dit oui !

entry.title: Omer series Episode 6 complete in urdu & hindi language

link.title: Omer series Episode 6 complete in urdu & hindi language

entry.content: Omar (Arabic: عُمَرْ‎) or Omar Farouk (Persian: عمر فاروق‎) is a historical[1][2] Arab television drama miniseries-serial that was produced and broadcast by MBC1 and directed by the Syrian director Hatem Ali.[3] Co-produced by Qatar TV, the series is based on the life of Omar ibn Al-Khattab, the second Caliph of Islam, and depicts his life from 18 years old until the moments of his death.[3] The series had to face large controversy[4][5][6][7][8][9][10] due to its depiction of Omar, Abu Bakr, Uthman and Ali, the four Rashidun Caliphs,[11] along with other characters, who some Muslims believe should not be depicted, much like Mohammad. The series consists of 31 episodes and was originally aired in the month of Ramadan since July 20, 2012.[12][13][14] It was made at a cost of 200 million Saudi riyals and filmed in Morocco, primarily in the cities of Marakesh, Tangiers, El Jadida, Casablanca and Mohammedia. After the series was broadcast on MBC, it was dubbed into several languages for international broadcast[15][16][17] and subtitled in English on YouTube; it received great support from many different scholarly bodies and people watching it.[18][19][20] As the series depended largely on reliable historical established facts, the series did not face criticism in terms of its content, as past films faced.
entry.summary: Omar (Arabic: عُمَرْ‎) or Omar Farouk (Persian: عمر فاروق‎) is a historical[1][2] Arab television drama miniseries-serial that was produced and broadcast by MBC1 and directed by the Syrian director Hatem Ali.[3] Co-produced by Qatar TV, the series is based on the life of Omar ibn Al-Khattab, the second Caliph of Islam, and depicts his life from 18 years old until the moments of his death.[3] The series had to face large controversy[4][5][6][7][8][9][10] due to its depiction of Omar, Abu Bakr, Uthman and Ali, the four Rashidun Caliphs,[11] along with other characters, who some Muslims believe should not be depicted, much like Mohammad. The series consists of 31 episodes and was originally aired in the month of Ramadan since July 20, 2012.[12][13][14] It was made at a cost of 200 million Saudi riyals and filmed in Morocco, primarily in the cities of Marakesh, Tangiers, El Jadida, Casablanca and Mohammedia. After the series was broadcast on MBC, it was dubbed into several languages for international broadcast[15][16][17] and subtitled in English on YouTube; it received great support from many different scholarly bodies and people watching it.[18][19][20] As the series depended largely on reliable historical established facts, the series did not face criticism in terms of its content, as past films faced.

entry.title: Nantes : la brigade des gestes barrières

link.title: Nantes : la brigade des gestes barrières

entry.content:
Les contrôles se multiplient chez les restaurateurs afin de vérifier le bon respect des gestes barrières.
La soirée avait bien commencé. Premier contrôle, tout y est : personnel masqué, gel hydroalcoolique à disposition, marquage au sol.
Ça se gâte ensuite dans un autre restaurant : pas de masque chez les serveurs, ni même en cuisine, pas de gel, pas de marquage, ni d’affichage. Surtout la terrasse pose problème dans cette rue étroite.
A défaut de mise en conformité, le respect pourra fermer l’établissement. Sur 10 contrôles effectués dans la soirée, un seul a posé problème.
entry.summary: Les contrôles se multiplient chez les restaurateurs afin de vérifier le bon respect des gestes barrières. La soirée avait bien commencé. Premier contrôle, tout y est : personnel masqué, gel hydroalcoolique à disposition, marquage au sol. Ça se gâte ensuite dans un autre restaurant : pas de masque chez les serveurs, ni même en cuisine, pas de gel, pas de marquage, ni d’affichage. Surtout la terrasse pose problème dans cette rue étroite. A défaut de mise en conformité, le respect pourra fermer l’établissement. Sur 10 contrôles effectués dans la soirée, un seul a posé problème.

entry.title: Coronavirus, chiude il nuovo locale di Pometto: il Tribunale non fa sconti sull’affitto durante il lockdown

link.title: Coronavirus, chiude il nuovo locale di Pometto: il Tribunale non fa sconti sull’affitto durante il lockdown

entry.content: Il re della pizza di Milano chiude il suo nuovo locale "Pizza Fest" dopo la sentenza del Tribunale che lo obbliga a pagare l’affitto nonostante il lockdown per il coronavirus.
entry.summary: Il re della pizza di Milano chiude il suo nuovo locale "Pizza Fest" dopo la sentenza del Tribunale che lo obbliga a pagare l’affitto nonostante il lockdown per il coronavirus.

Famicom Box (Hashimoto-kan, Fukushima City)… "Super Mario Bros.
This is the kind of event you should go to once in a while… "Game Center CX 3-chome Arino" launch event
Games (GB Edition)… December 1990

entry.title: Amitabh Bachchan shares life lesson, asks everyone to save yourselves from these kinds of individuals

link.title: Amitabh Bachchan shares life lesson, asks everyone to save yourselves from these kinds of individuals

entry.content: Amitabh Bachchan has been tested positive for Coronavirus recently. The megastar was rushed to Nanavati Hospital for the treatment. He has been updating fans about his health on his social media. On Wednesday he took to Instagram to share some wise words.
entry.summary: Amitabh Bachchan has been tested positive for Coronavirus recently. The megastar was rushed to Nanavati Hospital for the treatment. He has been updating fans about his health on his social media. On Wednesday he took to Instagram to share some wise words.

entry.title: Covid-19 : un Ehpad se reconfine dans le Finistère

link.title: Covid-19 : un Ehpad se reconfine dans le Finistère

entry.content:
Voilà une scène qu’on espérait ne plus revoir. Jacqueline est obligée de discuter avec sa belle-mère à travers la fenêtre.
L’Ehpad dans lequel elle habite a décidé de reconfiner ses résidents, après une hausse des cas de coronavirus dans plusieurs communes du Finistère. Le personnel de l’établissement essaie comme il peut de redonner du baume au coeur des résidents.
Si ce reconfinement est difficile, le directeur de l’Ehpad n’a pas hésité une seconde. Pour le moment, les visites sont interdites pendant quinze jours, mais l’Ehpad se réserve le droit de prolonger ce confinement, si les conditions sanitaires ne s’améliorent pas.
entry.summary: Voilà une scène qu’on espérait ne plus revoir. Jacqueline est obligée de discuter avec sa belle-mère à travers la fenêtre. L’Ehpad dans lequel elle habite a décidé de reconfiner ses résidents, après une hausse des cas de coronavirus dans plusieurs communes du Finistère. Le personnel de l’établissement essaie comme il peut de redonner du baume au coeur des résidents. Si ce reconfinement est difficile, le directeur de l’Ehpad n’a pas hésité une seconde. Pour le moment, les visites sont interdites pendant quinze jours, mais l’Ehpad se réserve le droit de prolonger ce confinement, si les conditions sanitaires ne s’améliorent pas.

entry.title: [TOO MYSTERY ZOMBIE WAR] Ep.3 줄 없는 번지점프에 도전한 TOO, 드디어 인간 툐둥이가 되다?! 툐미스테리

link.title: [TOO MYSTERY ZOMBIE WAR] Ep.3 줄 없는 번지점프에 도전한 TOO, 드디어 인간 툐둥이가 되다?! 툐미스테리

entry.content:
[툐미스테리:좀비워] Ep.3 줄 없는 번지점프에 도전한 TOO, 드디어 인간 툐둥이가 되다?! 툐미스테리
줄 없는 번지 점프? 너무 무섭툐ㅠㅠ
좀비툐를 살리기 위한 인간툐의 도전!
웅닭 VS 치닭 VS 찬닭, 닭싸움의 최종승자는?
Mnet M2 (엠투) 최신 클립 다시보기 :
entry.summary: [툐미스테리:좀비워] Ep.3 줄 없는 번지점프에 도전한 TOO, 드디어 인간 툐둥이가 되다?! 툐미스테리 줄 없는 번지 점프? 너무 무섭툐ㅠㅠ 좀비툐를 살리기 위한 인간툐의 도전! 웅닭 VS 치닭 VS 찬닭, 닭싸움의 최종승자는? Mnet M2 (엠투) 최신 클립 다시보기 :

entry.title: Taylor Swift to Release New Album ‘Folklore’ at Midnight RS News 7 23 20

link.title: Taylor Swift to Release New Album ‘Folklore’ at Midnight RS News 7 23 20

entry.content: Taylor Swift surprise announced her eighth studio album, Folklore, which she’ll release tonight at midnight. Swift wrote and recorded all the songs on the album in the past four months while in quarantine, collaborating with Aaron Dessner of the National, Bon Iver, William Bowery, and Jack Antonoff.
entry.summary: Taylor Swift surprise announced her eighth studio album, Folklore, which she’ll release tonight at midnight. Swift wrote and recorded all the songs on the album in the past four months while in quarantine, collaborating with Aaron Dessner of the National, Bon Iver, William Bowery, and Jack Antonoff.

entry.title: Los secretos de la industria de los videojuegos

link.title: Los secretos de la industria de los videojuegos

entry.content: Crear videojuegos y ponerlos a la venta es un proceso apasionante, pero también cargado de muchos sinsabores y partes complicadas. En este reportaje repasamos algunos secretos en el desarrollo de videojuegos como Grand Theft Auto o Red Dead Redemption que seguramente no conocías. Quizá ahora veas esos juegos desde otra perspectiva…
entry.summary: Crear videojuegos y ponerlos a la venta es un proceso apasionante, pero también cargado de muchos sinsabores y partes complicadas. En este reportaje repasamos algunos secretos en el desarrollo de videojuegos como Grand Theft Auto o Red Dead Redemption que seguramente no conocías. Quizá ahora veas esos juegos desde otra perspectiva…

entry.title: केन्द्र सरकार के खिलाफ भडक़े जोधपुर कांग्रेसजन, किया विरोध प्रदर्शन

link.title: केन्द्र सरकार के खिलाफ भडक़े जोधपुर कांग्रेसजन, किया विरोध प्रदर्शन

entry.content: जोधपुर. शहर जिला कांग्रेस कमेटी ने गुरुवार शाम जिला कांग्रेस कार्यालय में बैठक कर केन्द्र सरकार के खिलाफ निंदा प्रस्ताव पारित किया। सभा के पश्चात कांग्रेसजन ने केन्द्र सरकार के खिलाफ प्रदर्शन किया।
entry.summary: जोधपुर. शहर जिला कांग्रेस कमेटी ने गुरुवार शाम जिला कांग्रेस कार्यालय में बैठक कर केन्द्र सरकार के खिलाफ निंदा प्रस्ताव पारित किया। सभा के पश्चात कांग्रेसजन ने केन्द्र सरकार के खिलाफ प्रदर्शन किया।

entry.title: Incendie de la cathédrale de Nantes: pour la maire Johanna Rolland, ‘ce qui domine, c’est la tristesse’

link.title: Incendie de la cathédrale de Nantes: pour la maire Johanna Rolland, ‘ce qui domine, c’est la tristesse’

entry.content: La maire de Nantes Johanna Rolland  a réagi ce samedi à l’incendie qui a touché en début de matinée la cathédrale de la ville. "Ce qui domine, c’est la tristesse", a-t-elle déclaré, rappelant que les Nantais craignaient d’assister à la même chose qu’en 1972.
entry.summary: La maire de Nantes Johanna Rolland a réagi ce samedi à l’incendie qui a touché en début de matinée la cathédrale de la ville. "Ce qui domine, c’est la tristesse", a-t-elle déclaré, rappelant que les Nantais craignaient d’assister à la même chose qu’en 1972.
